positive: An abstract, stylized illustration of a mountain range at dawn, viewed through a geometric portal. The style is highly detailed, minimalist pop-art combined with retro vaporwave elements. Composition features the mountain silhouette centered against a gradient sky of deep violet, electric cyan, and soft orange. Strong, clean contrast is essential. Use linework and solid color blocks for the mountains and foreground elements (geometric portals, stylized flora). The lighting should be dramatic and stylized, emphasizing clean edges and graphic depth. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. Vector art aesthetic, high saturation, crisp focus.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, grainy, messy, text, watermark, logo, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, ugly, low detail, muddy colors
